{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thorngrass pill
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Also known as the [[Bloodmaker Pill]], the thorngrass pill is a medicinal item used to aid physical recovery. It is produced by combining three small leaves from life-aspected herbs with extra thorngrass sourced from the valley. The refinement process requires a twelfth-grade refinery or higher, utilizing a specific [[technique]] known as the Six-Pointed [[Star]] method to achieve a balanced state. Once weighed, blended, and shaped, the pills must stabilize for three days, resulting in a red and green appearance with a sharp scent. While the medicine does not affect a person's [[spirit]], it is intended to restore individuals to fighting condition following combat against the [[Sword Disciple]]. Users may experience unpleasant sensations, such as tingling around physical injuries, and are advised to cycle the pill for several days.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Thorngrass pill{{!}}thorngrass pill]] does not affect the [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Thorngrass pill{{!}}thorngrass pill]] can cause tingling around injuries.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
